hooks.prompt:
Hook input: $ARGUMENTS

Check whether this grep is necessary by cross-referencing with the architecture document (docs/codebase-architecture.md). If the information the grep is looking for is already in the architecture document, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "This information is already in the architecture document."}. If the information is not in the document and the grep is needed, respond with {"ok": true}.

Hook input: $ARGUMENTS

Check the stop_hook_active field in the input above. If it is true, respond with {"ok": true}. Otherwise, check whether the architecture document (docs/codebase-architecture.md) needs updating based on changes made this session. If it is already up to date or no relevant changes were made, respond with {"ok": true}. If it needs updating, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Architecture document needs updating to reflect changes made this session."}.
